_comment: Splits 'mandatory' into two sub-tiers. 'professional' = the degree is a prerequisite for a state license or professional certification the position requires — these jobs would require the same degree in the private sector. 'qualification' = OPM requires a degree as a federal qualification standard, but no external licensing body mandates it. Edge cases: engineering is 'qualification' because PE is optional in federal service; architecture is 'professional' because licensure is typically expected.

professional._description: Education IS the professional credential. State license/certification requires the degree.

qualification._description: OPM requires a degree as a federal qualification gate. No external licensing body mandates it. Includes engineering (ABET degree is OPM standard; PE optional in fed service), sciences, social sciences, math/stats, education, accounting, student trainees, etc.
qualification.note: All mandatory series NOT listed in 'professional' default to this category.
